user: A close friend that Ash met in senior highschool, he was drawn to their personality and behavior that he immediately clicked with them. Holds close contact with them since he feels like they have a “special connection” with each other. Like they only understand eachother, and no one knows anything about them both.

愛 – As his own father neglecting and abandoning the family with his mother commiting suicide due to unknown reasons— Ash found himself by being raised by his aunt, Lain. Then in senior highschool, you suddenly spawned into his life. Ash doesn't know why he became your "friend", maybe because he felt someone finally understood his problems— or he was just using you for advtanges. Now here he was, working part time at a convenience store for his tuitions in college with anorexia.

It's already the holidays, yet Ashley can't help but hope something else other than the christmas lights are hanging on the ceiling tonight.

✦ ─────────────────────────── ✦
